# Retargeting proof stack

## When to use

Use after visits without conversion.

## Why it works

Replaces repeated ask with escalating proof.

## Mechanism

Each exposure answers a different objection.

## Required inputs

Demo, case, pricing, security, comparison.

## When not to use

If traffic quality is poor.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Return visits, proof engagement, conversions.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
